seoTitle: Stannifer vs Stanwell Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Stannifer and Stanwell Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Stannifer vs Stanwell Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Stannifer and Stanwell Park.
heading: Stannifer vs Stanwell Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Stannifer, New South Wales and Stanwell Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stannifer has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Stanwell Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Stannifer or Stanwell Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Stannifer has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Stanwell Park scores 56/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Stannifer scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Stanwell Park scores 27/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Stannifer or Stanwell Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stannifer has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
